'''âk-d-w''' ('''kakadaw''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:namous|namous]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-d-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:namous|namous]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âk-d-w
|-
! Lemma
| kakadaw
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikadaw|thikadaw]] || [[word:jikadaw|jikadaw]] || [[word:shikadaw|shikadaw]] || [[word:kikadaw|kikadaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthukadaw|thuthukadaw]] || [[word:jujukadaw|jujukadaw]] || [[word:shushukadaw|shushukadaw]] || [[word:kukukadaw|kukukadaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thukadaw|thukadaw]] || [[word:jukadaw|jukadaw]] || [[word:shukadaw|shukadaw]] || [[word:kukadaw|kukadaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thukadaw|thukadaw]] || [[word:jukadaw|jukadaw]] || [[word:shukadaw|shukadaw]] || [[word:kukadaw|kukadaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thekadaw|thekadaw]] || [[word:jekadaw|jekadaw]] || [[word:shekadaw|shekadaw]] || [[word:kekadaw|kekadaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothokadaw|thothokadaw]] || [[word:jojokadaw|jojokadaw]] || [[word:shoshokadaw|shoshokadaw]] || [[word:kokokadaw|kokokadaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thokadaw|thokadaw]] || [[word:jokadaw|jokadaw]] || [[word:shokadaw|shokadaw]] || [[word:kokadaw|kokadaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokadaw|thokadaw]] || [[word:jokadaw|jokadaw]] || [[word:shokadaw|shokadaw]] || [[word:kokadaw|kokadaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠkadaw|thĂŠkadaw]] || [[word:jĂŠkadaw|jĂŠkadaw]] || [[word:shĂŠkadaw|shĂŠkadaw]] || [[word:kĂŠkadaw|kĂŠkadaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathakadaw|thathakadaw]] || [[word:jajakadaw|jajakadaw]] || [[word:shashakadaw|shashakadaw]] || [[word:kakakadaw|kakakadaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thakadaw|thakadaw]] || [[word:jakadaw|jakadaw]] || [[word:shakadaw|shakadaw]] || [[word:kakadaw|kakadaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thakadaw|thakadaw]] || [[word:jakadaw|jakadaw]] || [[word:shakadaw|shakadaw]] || [[word:kakadaw|kakadaw]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shakadaw|shakadaw]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshakadaw|goshakadaw]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishakadaw|gokishakadaw]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shakadawnĂŒ|shakadawnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshakadawnknĂŒ|goshakadawnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishakadawnĂŒ|gokishakadawnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shakadawshĂ«|shakadawshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshakadawnkshĂ«|goshakadawnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishakadawshĂ«|gokishakadawshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakadawro|shakadawro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakadawnkro|goshakadawnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakadawro|gokishakadawro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shakadawmu|shakadawmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakadawnkmu|goshakadawnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakadawmu|gokishakadawmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shakadawsher|shakadawsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshakadawnksher|goshakadawnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishakadawsher|gokishakadawsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shakadawng|shakadawng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshakadawnkng|goshakadawnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishakadawng|gokishakadawng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shakadawya|shakadawya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshakadawnkya|goshakadawnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishakadawya|gokishakadawya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shakadawyam|shakadawyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshakadawnkyam|goshakadawnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishakadawyam|gokishakadawyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakadawnĂŒshĂ«|shakadawnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakadawnknĂŒshĂ«|goshakadawnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakadawnĂŒshĂ«|gokishakadawnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakadawnĂŒro|shakadawnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakadawnknĂŒro|goshakadawnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakadawnĂŒro|gokishakadawnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakadawnĂŒmu|shakadawnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakadawnknĂŒmu|goshakadawnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakadawnĂŒmu|gokishakadawnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakadawshĂ«nĂŒ|shakadawshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakadawnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshakadawnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakadawshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishakadawshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakadawshĂ«ro|shakadawshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakadawnkshĂ«ro|goshakadawnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakadawshĂ«ro|gokishakadawshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakadawshĂ«mu|shakadawshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakadawnkshĂ«mu|goshakadawnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakadawshĂ«mu|gokishakadawshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakadawronĂŒ|shakadawronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakadawnkronĂŒ|goshakadawnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakadawronĂŒ|gokishakadawronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakadawroshĂ«|shakadawroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakadawnkroshĂ«|goshakadawnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakadawroshĂ«|gokishakadawroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakadawromu|shakadawromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakadawnkromu|goshakadawnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakadawromu|gokishakadawromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakadawmunĂŒ|shakadawmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakadawnkmunĂŒ|goshakadawnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakadawmunĂŒ|gokishakadawmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakadawmushĂ«|shakadawmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakadawnkmushĂ«|goshakadawnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakadawmushĂ«|gokishakadawmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakadawmuro|shakadawmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakadawnkmuro|goshakadawnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakadawmuro|gokishakadawmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
